description_pairs.source_description: Onboarding menu with progress bar, expandable item list, collapse/complete buttons, and optional close button on hover
description_pairs.json_description: A component for managing onboarding presets.

description_pairs.source_description: Bottom sheet promo dialog that auto-loads an optional image, shows title/message/action button, and dismisses itself on action or close
description_pairs.json_description: A component for displaying a promo dialog informing the user about a new feature in the service's mobile application.

description_pairs.source_description: Emoji/reaction bar with a palette popup for adding reactions, per-reaction tooltip support, configurable size, read-only mode, and fully customizable layout via render props
description_pairs.json_description: Component for user reactions (e.g. thumbs up, emoji etc) as in GitHub comments for example.

description_pairs.source_description: Share popover trigger that opens a list of social sharing options and copy-link button; supports Web Share API, hover or click activation, and full copy-button customization
description_pairs.json_description: Sharing component with support for social networks and copy link functionality.

description_pairs.source_description: Renders an App Store or Google Play badge as an accessible link or clickable div depending on whether an href is provided, with language-specific badge SVGs
description_pairs.json_description: Store Badge can be used to place links to the Google Play and AppStore app stores.

description_pairs.source_description: Modal carousel of story slides with keyboard arrow navigation, optional cross-tab sync, and configurable close/next/previous callbacks
description_pairs.json_description: Component for displaying stories. It looks like a carousel in a modal with given places to display text and media.

description_pairs.source_description: Modal carousel for grouped stories with a thumbnail preview slider, group/item navigation, and configurable max slider item count
description_pairs.json_description: Component for displaying group of stories. It looks like a carousel in a modal with given places to display text and media.
